summary: Iteration 35 - Tested film quality rebalance, challenge battle system (3 matches x 8 skills), and cast renegotiation. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: /games page loads with mini games and VS challenges, dashboard has no contest stats section (correct), film creation page has renegotiate button in rejection modal (code verified).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, renegotiate button verified in code)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter35 features verified: 1) Challenge system uses 3 matches with 8 skill battles each (direction, cinematography, screenplay, acting, soundtrack, effects, editing, charisma) + optional tiebreaker. 2) Film quality now uses base=42, luck_factor=[-10,-5,-3,0,0,0,3,5,8,12], gaussian roll std=12, resulting in balanced distribution. 3) Cast renegotiation: POST /api/cast/renegotiate/{id} works with {new_offer: number}, up to 3 attempts. Rejection modal has data-testid='rejection-modal', 'renegotiate-btn', 'renegotiate-offer-input'.

TestChallengeSystemMatches.test_tiebreaker_on_4_4_draw: PASSED - tiebreaker triggers on 4-4 draw with audience_satisfaction

TestFilmQualityDistribution.test_quality_distribution_simulation: PASSED - 100 films show balanced distribution (not all poor/flop)
TestFilmQualityDistribution.test_quality_improves_with_level: PASSED - higher level players get better average quality

TestCastRenegotiation.test_cast_offer_rejection_returns_negoti: PASSED - rejection has negotiation_id, can_renegotiate, requested_fee
TestCastRenegotiation.test_renegotiate_endpoint: PASSED - POST /api/cast/renegotiate/{id} accepts new_offer and returns correct fields

frontend_tests_details.games_page: PASSED - /games loads with Mini Games (Film Trivia, Guess the Genre, Director Match, Box Office Bet, Release Year), Mini Game VS 1v1 section with Create Challenge/Open Challenges/History tabs, and Contest section with Daily/Weekly tabs

frontend_tests_details.film_creation_page: PASSED - Film creation wizard loads with 12 steps, renegotiate button verified in code (data-testid='renegotiate-btn' at line 5307)
